59997319.title: List of Michael McIntyre's Big Show episodes

pageprops.displaytitle: List of Michael McIntyre's Big Show episodes

59997319.extract: Michael McIntyre's Big Show (also known as Michael McIntyre's Big Christmas Show) is a BAFTA award-winning British variety and stand-up comedy television series, presented by British comedian, presenter Michael McIntyre.
